name: Elux Legend 1500 2-in-1 Pod Kit
description: Can't decide on a flavour? The Elux Legend 1500 2-in-1 Pod Kit lets you have both. Simply twist the mouthpiece to switch between the two flavours, making it the perfect companion for long days out or travelling.

name: Aspire Gotek X3 Kit
description: Aspire’s legendary Gotek series returns with the Aspire Gotek X3 Kit. Retaining the iconic translucent cyberpunk aesthetic, the X3 brings a larger 1000mAh battery to the table, ensuring you have enough power for a full day of heavy vaping. Lightweight, durable, and purely draw-activated, it’s the ultimate grab-and-go device.

name: Oxva Xlim Pro 2 DNA Pod Kit
description: OXVA meets high-end engineering in the Oxva Xlim Pro 2 DNA Pod Kit. For the first time, the legendary Evolv DNA chipset is integrated into the Xlim series, offering unmatched power accuracy and efficiency. Boasting a 1300mAh battery and a brilliant 2.0-inch OLED display, this is the "luxury edition" of pod vaping.

name: Oxva Xlim SS Stainless Steel Replacement Pods
description: The OXVA Xlim SS Pods. Stainless Steel Pods offer a refined alternative to standard mesh pods. By utilizing high-grade Stainless Steel as the heating element, these 2ml OXVA Xlim SS Pods deliver a crisp, "clean" flavour profile that many vapers prefer for subtle fruits and mints. Featuring the convenient V3 top-fill design, they are compatible with the entire Xlim range.

name: Doozy Infinity Nic Salt
description: The Doozy Infinity Nic Salt range represents the next level of flavour engineering. These liquids are designed for vapers who want "infinite" depth in their juice. Focusing on punchy fruits and icy soda-inspired blends, Infinity Salts offer a high-intensity vaping experience that stays consistent from the first puff to the last drop of the bottle. \n \nStock up on Doozy 10mls and save big! Mix & match any flavours — 4 for £10 or 10 for £20. Discounts are automatically applied at checkout, no codes, no hassle.

name: Doozy Infinity Pod Fill 50/50 100ml Shortfill E-liquid
description: The Doozy Infinity Pod Fill range is a game-changer for pod users. Unlike standard high-VG shortfills, these are mixed to a 50/50 VG/PG ratio, making them perfectly thin enough for pod kits and MTL tanks. It’s the most cost-effective way to enjoy premium Doozy flavours without buying multiple 10ml bottles.

name: Doozy Infinity 70/30 100ml Shortfill E-liquid
description: Doozy Infinity Shortfills are built for the cloud-chasers. Featuring a 70/30 VG/PG ratio, this high-VG range is designed for sub-ohm tanks and high-wattage mods. Each 120ml bottle contains 100ml of nicotine-free e-liquid, leaving enough space for two 10ml nicotine shots to reach your desired strength.

name: IVG Pro 12 Prefilled Pod Kit
description: IVG takes high-capacity vaping to the next level with the IVG Pro 12 Prefilled Pod Kit. This prefilled pod kit delivers a massive 12,000 puffs through its unique rotating pod system. Housing a 1000mAh rechargeable battery, it’s designed to provide consistent, high-intensity flavour from the first puff to the last. Simple, stylish, and incredibly cost-effective.
category: Disposable Alternatives & Prefilled Pod Vape Kits

name: IVG Pro 12 Prefilled Pods
description: Keep your IVG Pro 12 Kit going with these official IVG Pro 12 Prefilled Pods. Prefilled with 20mg (2%) nicotine salt e-liquid, these pods utilize high-performance mesh coils to deliver the legendary IVG flavour profile. Designed for easy installation, they ensure your high-capacity setup remains fresh and flavourful.

name: VooPoo Argus Matrix Pod Vape Kit
description: The VooPoo Argus Matrix Pod Vape Kit is where "vape meets tech." Featuring a bold, cyberpunk-inspired transparent chassis and a hidden LED display, this 40W powerhouse is built for vapers who want to stand out. With an 1100mAh battery and stepless airflow, it provides a highly customisable vape in a rugged, pocket-friendly frame.

name: VooPoo Vinci E80 Pod Kit
description: The VooPoo Vinci E80 Pod Kit brings "Pro" level performance to the Vinci series. This sleek, single-18650 pod mod (battery sold separately) delivers up to 80W of power, making it a versatile choice for both cloud-chasing DTL vapers and flavour-focused MTL users. Featuring the advanced Gene.TT 2.0 chipset, it offers lightning-fast firing and multiple safety protections.

name: VooPoo Vinci E Vape Pods
description: Optimised for the latest VooPoo hardware, the VooPoo Vinci E Pods feature a convenient top-fill system and advanced leak-resistant technology. Available in a variety of mesh resistances, these 2ml pods are designed to deliver a rich, flavourful Mouth-to-Lung (MTL) or Restricted-Direct-to-Lung (RDTL) experience.

name: Vaporesso Dojo Blast 10k Prefilled Pod Kit
description: Vaporesso enters the "Big Puff" arena with the Dojo Blast 10k. Combining a 2ml pod with a dedicated 10ml e-liquid refill bottle, this kit provides a seamless 10,000 puff experience. Powered by COREX Mesh technology, it delivers explosive flavour and a consistently smooth throat hit, outlasting standard disposables by five times.
category: Disposable Alternatives & Prefilled Pod Vape Kits

name: Vaporesso Dojo Blast 10K Refill
description: Keep the clouds coming with the Vaporesso Dojo Blast 10K Refill. This replacement pack includes a fresh 2ml pod and the integrated 10ml refill container, prefilled with 20mg nicotine salt e-liquid. Simply slot it into your Dojo Blast device to enjoy another 10,000 puffs of premium Vaporesso flavour.

Featuring a 1000mAh rechargeable battery and a sleek visual display, it’s the ultimate high-capacity alternative to traditional disposables.

name: Uwell Caliburn G4 Pro Pod Vape Kit
description: The Uwell Caliburn G4 Pro is the world’s first pod kit to feature a massive 2.51-inch full-length touchscreen. Powered by a huge 1800mAh battery and delivering up to 35W, this device blurs the line between a pod system and a high-end mod. With Pro-Focs 4.0 flavour tech and four custom vaping modes, it’s the most advanced Caliburn to date.

name: Oxva Xlim Go 2 Pod Kit
description: The OXVA Xlim Go 2 Pod Kit is the upgraded successor to the bestselling Xlim Go. It boasts a significantly larger 1500mAh battery, delivering up to 2 days of vaping on a single charge. With its buttonless "auto-draw" design, smart wattage detection up to 30W, and a unique "Starry" battery indicator, it offers a premium, low-maintenance experience for any vaper.

name: Aspire Zelos M80 Kit
description: The Aspire Zelos M80 Kit pairs the rugged M80 mod with the refined Nautilus 3SR Tank. This combination offers a complete solution for MTL, RDL, and DTL vapers. Featuring a 2600mAh battery, a massive 0.96" colour screen, and the legendary flavour of the Nautilus coil series, this kit sets a new standard for high-performance starter kits in 2025.

name: Aspire Zelos M80 Mod
description: Built for durability and precision, the Aspire Zelos M80 Mod is a versatile powerhouse for any 510-threaded tank. Powered by a 2600mAh internal battery with 2A fast charging, it delivers up to 80W of power. With its industrial-strength metallic frame and a dedicated physical lock switch, it’s the ultimate choice for vapers who need a reliable, "pocket-safe" device.

name: Uwell Caliburn G4 Mini Pod Kit
description: Uwell’s most popular line gets a 2025 upgrade with the Caliburn G4 Mini Pod Kit. This streamlined version of the G4 features an 1100mAh battery and a punchy 35W maximum output. Utilizing the latest PRO-FOCS 4.0 technology, it offers a 35% boost in flavour intensity and pod longevity, making it one of the most flavourful MTL kits on the market.

name: Voopoo Argus G3 Mini Pod Kit
description: Small but mighty, the Voopoo Argus G3 Mini Pod Kit is the minimalist powerhouse of the Argus family. It packs a 1350mAh battery and 30W of power into a featherweight 40g body. Featuring the new iCosm Code 2.0 technology, it provides a leak-proof experience and significantly longer coil life compared to previous generations.

name: Oxva SlimStick Prefilled Pod Kit
description: The OXVA SlimStick Prefilled Pod Kit is a revolutionary "cigalike" system designed for those transitioning from smoking or disposables. Despite its ultra-slim profile, it houses a massive 1500mAh battery—larger than most standard pod kits—allowing it to last through up to five prefilled pods on a single charge. It’s lightweight (58g), durable, and entirely button-free.

name: Oxva SlimStick Prefilled Pods
description: Designed exclusively for the SlimStick device, these OXVA SlimStick Prefilled Pods offer the ultimate convenience. Each 2ml pod is prefilled with premium 20mg nicotine salt e-liquid and features an integrated mesh coil for instant, intense flavour. Sold in packs of two, each pod provides approximately 600 puffs.

name: Goat Nicotine Pouches
description: Live up to the name with Goat Nicotine Pouches. This range aims to be the "Greatest of All Time" by perfecting the balance between pouch moisture, nicotine release, and flavour longevity. Goat Nicotine Pouches offer a premium feel and a variety of strengths to suit both new and experienced pouch users.

name: Dope Nicotine Pouches
description: High-energy and high-intensity, Dope Nicotine Pouches are designed to give you an instant lift. With a focus on "Freeze" and "Ice" profiles, these pouches provide a strong tactile sensation under the lip. Dope Nicotine Pouches are the perfect smoke-free companion for active lifestyles and busy days.

name: SYX Nicotine Pouches
description: Balanced and bold, SYX Nicotine Pouches provide a sophisticated alternative to smoking or vaping. These all-white pouches are designed to stay comfortable for longer, with a flavour-lock technology that prevents the "drip" often found in cheaper brands. SYX Nicotine Pouches are perfect for those who want a steady, reliable nicotine source.

name: Killa Nicotine Pouches
description: Join the millions of users who trust Killa Nicotine Pouches for their daily nicotine. Known for their "Cold Mint" bestseller and an array of fruity variations, Killa offers a punchy 16mg/g nicotine hit. Killa Nicotine Pouches are slim, moist, and provide a world-class tobacco-free experience.

name: Pablo Nicotine Pouches
description: Not for the faint-hearted, Pablo Nicotine Pouches are the industry standard for "dangerously strong" nicotine hits. These extra-strong pouches deliver an almost instant nicotine rush combined with a sharp, icy burn. Pablo Nicotine Pouches are the go-to choice for veteran users who require the highest level of intensity.

name: V & YOU Nicotine Pouches
description: Experience the refined side of nicotine with V & YOU Nicotine Pouches. Designed in the UK with a focus on purity and consumer wellness, these pouches come in a variety of expertly balanced flavours. Each V & YOU Nicotine Pouch offer a smooth, steady release of nicotine in a soft-touch pouch that feels invisible under the lip.

name: CLEW Nicotine Pouches
description: Keep it fresh with CLEW Nicotine Pouches. These slim-format, tobacco-free pouches focus on crisp, clean flavours that leave your mouth feeling refreshed. Each CLEW Nicotine Pouch is designed for modern users who want a mid-strength nicotine hit without the bulk or drip of traditional snus.

name: CUBA Nicotine Pouches
description: For those who prefer a harder hit, CUBA Nicotine Pouches deliver a punchy nicotine release in a slim format. These "Black Edition" and "Ninja" pouches are famous for their high nicotine concentrations and soft pouch material.Each CUBA Nicotine Pouch offer a long-lasting, tobacco-free alternative for experienced users.

name: Iceberg Nicotine Pouches
description: The ultimate "Thrill-Seeker" pouch. Iceberg Nicotine Pouches famous for their massive flavour variety and extreme nicotine hits that deliver an instant, frosty punch.

name: SMOK Arco Digi Pod Kit
description: Take total control of your vape with the SMOK Arco Digi Pod Kit. While sharing the same 1300mAh battery as the E1, the Digi version introduces a vibrant 0.84-inch LCD screen and three distinct power modes (ECO, NOM, and MAX). It is the ideal choice for vapers who want the portability of a pod system with the data and customization of a full-sized mod.

name: SMOK Arco E1 Pod Kit
description: SMOK Arco E1 Pod Kit \n \nThe SMOK Arco E1 Pod Kit is the perfect entry point into the Arco ecosystem. Combining a robust 1300mAh battery with a sleek, metallic chassis, it delivers a consistent 30W of power. Featuring Smart Mode technology, the device automatically adjusts its wattage to match your pod, ensuring a perfect puff every time without the need for manual settings.

name: SMOK Arco Replacement Pods (3-Pack)
description: SMOK Arco Replacement Pods \n \nThe SMOK Arco Replacement Pods are the heart of the Arco E1 and Arco Digi systems. Featuring a user-friendly top-fill design, you can refill your 2ml of e-liquid without even removing the pod from your device. These pods utilize "aroma-boosting" mesh technology to ensure every drop of juice tastes as fresh as the first.

name: SMOK D-Coil Series Coils (5-Pack)
description: SMOK D-Coil Series \n \nUnlock the full potential of your sub-ohm setup with SMOK D-Coil Series Coils. These high-performance mesh coils are designed for the TF-D Subtank and the X-Priv series. Featuring a unique hexagonal mesh structure for even heating, these coils deliver massive clouds and crisp, clean flavour in every puff.

name: SMOK Mavic Pro RF Pod Kit
description: SMOK Mavic Pro RF Pod Kit \n \nThe SMOK Mavic Pro RF Pod Kit is the ultimate "disposable killer." Featuring a sleek pen-style design and the advanced DCOIL-A1 6.0 chipset, it delivers the intense flavour and ease of a disposable with the sustainability of a refillable system. With a 1000mAh battery and inhale activation, it’s the perfect pocket-friendly companion for all-day vaping.

name: SMOK Mavic Pro RF Replacement Pods (3-Pack)
description: SMOK Mavic Pro RF Replacement Pods \n \nKeep your Mavic Pro RF kit running smoothly with this 3-pack of SMOK Mavic Pro RF Replacement Pods. Featuring a 0.8Ω integrated mesh coil, these pods are optimized for nicotine salts and 50/50 e-liquids. The leak-resistant side-fill design and magnetic connection make maintenance quick and hassle-free.

name: SMOK Novo ECO Pod Kit
description: SMOK Novo ECO Pod Kit \n \nVaping goes green with the SMOK Novo ECO Pod Kit. This innovative device features a removable 1000mAh battery, allowing for easy recycling or replacement to extend the life of your kit. Delivering up to 30W of power with Soft and Hard output modes, the Novo ECO is a versatile, eco-conscious choice for both MTL and RDTL vapers.

name: SMOK Novo GT Box Pod Kit
description:
SMOK Novo GT Box Pod Kit

\nFor vapers who demand the most battery life possible in a compact pod, the SMOK Novo GT Box Pod Kit is the ultimate choice. Boasting a massive 1700mAh battery and a stunning 2.01-inch full-screen display, this square-form pod kit is built for endurance and style. It delivers up to 30W of power and is fully compatible with the entire Novo pod family.

name: SMOK Novo GT Pod Kit
description: SMOK Novo GT Pod Kit \n \nThe SMOK Novo GT Pod Kit brings a futuristic "dual-screen" aesthetic to the legendary Novo line. Powered by a long-lasting 1300mAh internal battery, it offers up to 30W of adjustable power. With its sleek pen-style form factor and stepless airflow control, it’s a high-performance kit that fits perfectly in your pocket.

name: SMOK Novo M Replacement Pods (3-Pack)
description: SMOK Novo M Replacement Pods \n \nSpecifically designed for the newest generation of Novo hardware, SMOK Novo M Replacement Pods feature a refined top-fill system where the mouthpiece acts as a protective cap. These 2ml mesh pods are the standard for the Novo GT series, offering a balanced and intense flavour profile for both MTL and RDL vapers.

name: SMOK TF-D Subtank
description: SMOK TF-D Subtank \n \nThe SMOK TF-D Subtank is a high-performance 510-thread tank designed for serious sub-ohm vapers. Featuring a leak-resistant top-airflow design and a convenient top-fill system, it is the perfect companion for high-wattage mods. Powered by the advanced SMOK D-Coil series, it delivers unmatched cloud production and flavour purity.

name: SMOK Novo SLR Replacement Pods (3-Pack)
description: SMOK Novo SLR Replacement Pods \n \nUpgrade your refilling experience with the SMOK Novo SLR Replacement Pods. Featuring a "Spring Loaded Refill" (SLR) system, these pods allow you to top up your e-liquid via a push-to-fill membrane, eliminating the need for silicone bungs. Designed for the Novo Eco but compatible with various Novo series kits, these 2ml pods deliver premium MTL and RDL performance.

name: SMOK X-Priv Plus Vape Kit
description: SMOK X-Priv Plus Vape Kit \n \nThe legend returns. The SMOK X-Priv Plus Kit combines high-performance sub-ohm vaping with a stunning, modern aesthetic. Featuring a massive vibrant touch-screen and a maximum output of 225W, this dual-18650 device (batteries sold separately) is paired with the leak-resistant TF-D Subtank for a truly premium Direct-to-Lung experience.

name: SMOK X-Priv Solo Vape Kit
description: SMOK X-Priv Solo Vape Kit \n \nThe SMOK X-Priv Solo Vape Kit delivers a full 80W of power in the world's smallest sub-ohm mod kit. Designed for superior flavour and portability, this kit pairs the compact X-Priv Solo Mod with the 2ml TF-D Subtank, renowned for its leak-resistant top airflow and clean, convenient top-fill design. The mod is easily controlled via a sleek touchscreen display and powered by a single external 18650 battery (sold separately), offering experienced vapers unmatched performance and quick battery swaps for all-day use.

name: SMOK X-Priv Solo Vape Mod
description: The SMOK X-Priv Solo Vape Mod delivers heavyweight performance in a featherlight package. Touting up to 80W of pure power, this incredibly compact vape mod is powered by a single external 18650 battery (sold separately) for quick swaps and all-day use. \n \nNavigate settings effortlessly using the large, responsive touch screen interface and enjoy the tactile feedback of the full-length side fire bar. This is the ultimate choice for experienced vapers demanding DTL power and advanced customisation in a truly portable device.

name: SMOK Zrex RF Pod Kit
description: The SMOK Zrex RF Pod Kit is the ultimate beginner vape kit and disposable alternative, engineered for effortless Mouth-to-Lung (MTL) vaping. Designed for simplicity, it features a reliable 500mAh battery and a fixed-wattage output, meaning zero settings or buttons to worry about. \n \nSimply inhale to activate. With a built-in mesh coil (0.8Ω) in the 2ml refillable pod, the Zrex RF delivers a consistently smooth, flavour-rich experience, perfect for use with Nic Salt and 50/50 e-liquids. It also includes an essential childproof lock for safety and peace of mind.

name: SMOK Zrex RF Replacement Pods (3-Pack)
description: SMOK Zrex RF Replacement Pods \n \nSpecifically designed for the Zrex RF system, these SMOK Zrex RF Replacement Pods come in a convenient 3-pack. Each 2ml pod features an integrated 0.8Ω Mesh Coil, providing a smooth, flavourful MTL draw that is perfect for nicotine salts and freebase 50/50 e-liquids.

name: Vaporesso XROS Corex 3.0 Pods (4-Pack)
description: XROS Corex 3.0 Pods. Experience the next generation of XROS technology with Vaporesso XROS Corex 3.0 Pods. This 4-pack introduces an upgraded morph-mesh structure that increases flavour reproduction and extends coil lifespan by up to 30%. Fully backwards compatible with the entire XROS device family, including the XROS 4 and XROS Pro.

name: Vaporesso XROS Pro 2 Pod Kit
description: The Vaporesso Xros Pro 2 Pod Kit sets a new benchmark for portability and endurance, featuring a class-leading 2000mAh built-in battery packed into an impossibly ultra-light 65g aerospace alloy body. Never wait long to vape again—this powerful device boasts 2A USB-C fast charging, allowing it to reach a full charge in approximately 30 minutes. name: Vaporesso Luxe X3 Pod Kit
description: The Vaporesso Luxe X3 Pod Kit redefines "all-day vaping" with its industry-leading 2600mAh mega battery, providing up to 4 days of use on a single charge. Compatible with the entire Luxe X pod range and GTX coils, the Vaporesso Luxe X3 Pod Kit is the ultimate crossover between a simple pod and a high-performance mod.

description: Upgrade your vaping experience with the Vaporesso Luxe X Dual Mesh Pods, engineered with advanced dual-layer mesh technology for "dual richness" in every puff. description: The Uwell Caliburn G5 Lite SE combines high-end aesthetics with industry-leading endurance. Equipped with a clear e-liquid window and intelligent Smart Mode, the Uwell Caliburn G5 Lite SE provides a seamless, button-free vaping experience for both MTL and RDL enthusiasts.
